articles.title: Mexican teachers threaten World Cup protests over salary proposal
articles.excerpt:
Mexican teachers protest low salary offers, threatening to disrupt the World Cup starting June 11 if their demands for a pay raise are not met.

Read More: https://punchng.com/mexican-teachers-threaten-world-cup-protests-over-salary-proposal/
